member.name: T:Sudoku.Graphics.Canvas
member.summary: Represents a canvas that allows you drawing sudoku-related items onto it.

member.name: M:Sudoku.Graphics.Canvas.#ctor(Sudoku.Graphics.PointMapper)
member.summary: Represents a canvas that allows you drawing sudoku-related items onto it.

member.name: F:Sudoku.Graphics.Canvas._surface
member.summary: Indicates the backing surface object.

member.name: F:Sudoku.Graphics.Canvas._isDisposed
member.summary: Indicates whether the object has already been disposed.

member.name: M:Sudoku.Graphics.Canvas.ExportAsync(System.String,Sudoku.Graphics.CanvasExportingOptions,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Export image into target file, asynchronously.
member.param: The cancellation token that allows you cancelling the operation if necessary.
member.returns: A object that allows you visiting states on asynchronous task.
member.exception: Throws when the target file extension is not supported.

member.name: M:Sudoku.Graphics.Canvas.GetFormatFromExtension(System.String)
member.summary: Returns from extension string.
member.exception: Throws when the target format is not supported.

member.name: T:Sudoku.Graphics.CanvasDrawingOptions
member.summary: Represents drawing options.

member.name: F:Sudoku.Graphics.CanvasDrawingOptions.Default
member.summary: Indicates the default options.

member.name: P:Sudoku.Graphics.CanvasDrawingOptions.DrawCandidateAuxiliaryLines
member.summary: Indicates whether candidate auxiliary lines are also drawn or not. By default it's .

member.name: P:Sudoku.Graphics.CanvasDrawingOptions.GivenDigitsFontName
member.summary: Indicates given digits font name. By default it's "Tahoma".

member.name: P:Sudoku.Graphics.CanvasDrawingOptions.ModifiableDigitsFontName
member.summary: Indicates modifiable digits font name. By default it's "Tahoma".

member.name: P:Sudoku.Graphics.CanvasDrawingOptions.CandidatesFontName
member.summary: Indicates candidates font name. By default it's "Tahoma".

member.name: P:Sudoku.Graphics.CanvasDrawingOptions.GivenDigitsFontWeight
member.summary: Indicates given digits font weight. By default it's .

member.name: P:Sudoku.Graphics.CanvasDrawingOptions.ModifiableDigitsFontWeight
member.summary: Indicates modifiable digits font weight. By default it's .

member.name: P:Sudoku.Graphics.CanvasDrawingOptions.CandidatesFontWeight
member.summary: Indicates candidates font weight. By default it's .

member.name: P:Sudoku.Graphics.CanvasDrawingOptions.GivenDigitsFontWidth
member.summary: Indicates given digits font width. By default it's .

member.name: P:Sudoku.Graphics.CanvasDrawingOptions.ModifiableDigitsFontWidth
member.summary: Indicates modifiable digits font width. By default it's .

member.name: P:Sudoku.Graphics.CanvasDrawingOptions.CandidatesFontWidth
member.summary: Indicates candidates font width. By default it's .

member.name: P:Sudoku.Graphics.CanvasDrawingOptions.GivenDigitsFontSlant
member.summary: Indicates given digits font slant. By default it's (default).

member.name: P:Sudoku.Graphics.CanvasDrawingOptions.ModifiableDigitsFontSlant
member.summary: Indicates modifiable digits font slant. By default it's (default).

member.name: P:Sudoku.Graphics.CanvasDrawingOptions.CandidatesFontSlant
member.summary: Indicates candidates font slant. By default it's (default).

member.name: P:Sudoku.Graphics.CanvasDrawingOptions.CandidateAuxiliaryLineStrokeThicknessRatio
member.summary: Indicates stroke thickness ratio of candidate auxiliary lines, relative to candidate size. By default it's 0.0125. The value should be consumed if is .

remarks.para: The ratio value can be calculated by fact-stroke-thickness / candidate-size, or another formula fact-stroke-thickness = candidate-size * ratio.
For example, if candidate-size is 40 and fact-stroke-thickness is 0.5, then we can get ratio = 0.5 / 40 = 0.0125.

member.name: P:Sudoku.Graphics.CanvasDrawingOptions.GridLineStrokeThicknessRatio
member.summary: Indicates stroke thickness ratio of normal cell lines, relative to candidate size. By default it's 0.05 (4 times with ).

member.name: P:Sudoku.Graphics.CanvasDrawingOptions.BlockLineStrokeThicknessRatio
member.summary: Indicates stroke thickness ratio of block lines, relative to candidate size. By default it's 0.2 (16 times with ).

member.name: P:Sudoku.Graphics.CanvasDrawingOptions.GivenDigitsFontSizeRatio
member.summary: Indicates font size ratio of given digits, relative to cell size. By default it's 75%.

member.name: P:Sudoku.Graphics.CanvasDrawingOptions.ModifiableDigitsFontSizeRatio
member.summary: Indicates font size ratio of modifiable digits, relative to cell size. By default it's 75%.

member.name: P:Sudoku.Graphics.CanvasDrawingOptions.CandidatesFontSizeRatio
member.summary: Indicates font size ratio of candidates, relative to cell size. By default it's 25%.

member.name: P:Sudoku.Graphics.CanvasDrawingOptions.GridLineDashSequence
member.summary: Indicates grid line dash sequence. By default it's empty array.

member.name: P:Sudoku.Graphics.CanvasDrawingOptions.BlockLineDashSequence
member.summary: Indicates cell line dash sequence. By default it's empty array.

member.name: P:Sudoku.Graphics.CanvasDrawingOptions.CandidateAuxiliaryLineDashSequence
member.summary: Indicates candidate auxiliary line dash sequence. By default it's empty array.

member.name: P:Sudoku.Graphics.CanvasDrawingOptions.BackgroundColor
member.summary: Indicates background color.

member.name: P:Sudoku.Graphics.CanvasDrawingOptions.CandidateAuxiliaryLineStrokeColor
member.summary: Indicates stroke color of candidate auxiliary lines. By default it's .

member.name: P:Sudoku.Graphics.CanvasDrawingOptions.GridLineStrokeColor
member.summary: Indicates stroke color of grid lines. By default it's .

member.name: P:Sudoku.Graphics.CanvasDrawingOptions.BlockLineStrokeColor
member.summary: Indicates stroke color of block lines. By default it's .

member.name: P:Sudoku.Graphics.CanvasDrawingOptions.GivenDigitsColor
member.summary: Indicates color of given digits. By default it's .

member.name: P:Sudoku.Graphics.CanvasDrawingOptions.ModifiableDigitsColor
member.summary: Indicates color of modifiable digits. By default it's .

member.name: P:Sudoku.Graphics.CanvasDrawingOptions.CandidatesColor
member.summary: Indicates color of candidates. By default it's .

member.name: M:Sudoku.Graphics.CanvasDrawingOptions.LoadFrom(System.String)
member.summary: Loads configuration from JSON file, specified by its path. If the specified file doesn't exist, will be returned.

member.name: M:Sudoku.Graphics.CanvasDrawingOptions.SaveTo(Sudoku.Graphics.CanvasDrawingOptions,System.String)
T:Sudoku.Graphics.CanvasDrawingOptions.LineDashSequenceConverter
member.summary: Represents JSON converter.

member.name: T:Sudoku.Graphics.CanvasDrawingOptions.RatioConverter
member.summary: Represents a JSON converter for instances.

member.name: T:Sudoku.Graphics.CanvasDrawingOptions.SKColorConverter
member.summary: Represents JSON converter.

member.name: T:Sudoku.Graphics.CanvasExportingOptions
member.summary: Represents exporting options.

member.name: F:Sudoku.Graphics.CanvasExportingOptions.Default
member.summary: Indicates the default options.

member.name: P:Sudoku.Graphics.CanvasExportingOptions.Quality
member.summary: Indicates the quality. Range 0..100. Default 80.

member.name: T:Sudoku.Graphics.LineDashSequence
member.summary: Represents a sequence of dash intervals.

member.summary: The backing intervals.

member.summary: Initializes a .

member.summary: Initializes a via the specified intervals.

member.name: P:Sudoku.Graphics.LineDashSequence.IsEmpty
member.summary: Indicates whether the sequence is empty.

member.name: P:Sudoku.Graphics.LineDashSequence.Intervals
member.summary: Indicates interval values.

member.name: P:Sudoku.Graphics.LineDashSequence.Item(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns the element at the specified index.

member.name: M:Sudoku.Graphics.LineDashSequence.Add(System.Single)
member.summary: Adds a new element into the collection.

member.name: M:Sudoku.Graphics.LineDashSequence.Create(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Single})
member.summary: Creates a instance via intervals.

member.summary: Implicit cast from into .

member.name: T:Sudoku.Graphics.PointMapper
member.summary: Represents a mapper instance that projects from pixel points into sudoku elements (coordinates), or from sudoku elements into points.

member.name: M:Sudoku.Graphics.PointMapper.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Single)
member.summary: Represents a mapper instance that projects from pixel points into sudoku elements (coordinates), or from sudoku elements into points.

member.name: P:Sudoku.Graphics.PointMapper.Size
member.summary: Indicates size of the picture.

member.name: P:Sudoku.Graphics.PointMapper.Margin
member.summary: Indicates margin of the picture.

member.name: P:Sudoku.Graphics.PointMapper.GridSize
member.summary: Indicates size of grid.

member.name: P:Sudoku.Graphics.PointMapper.BlockSize
member.summary: Indicates size of block.

member.name: P:Sudoku.Graphics.PointMapper.CellSize
member.summary: Indicates size of cell.

member.name: P:Sudoku.Graphics.PointMapper.CandidateSize
member.summary: Indicates size of candidate.

member.name: M:Sudoku.Graphics.PointMapper.GetCandidateTopLeftPoint(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets top-left point of a candidate, specified by row and column index (in range 0..28).
member.exception: Throws when either argument or isn't between 0 and 27.

member.name: M:Sudoku.Graphics.PointMapper.GetCellCenterPoint(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns center point of the specified cell.

member.name: M:Sudoku.Graphics.PointMapper.GetCandidateCenterPoint(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns center point of the specified candidate.

member.name: T:Sudoku.Graphics.Primitives.ICanvas
member.summary: Represents required members on a canvas.

member.name: P:Sudoku.Graphics.Primitives.ICanvas.IsDisposed
member.summary: Indicates whether the object is disposed or not. This property should be explicitly-implemented.

member.summary: Indicates the mapper.

member.name: P:Sudoku.Graphics.Primitives.ICanvas.BackingCanvas
member.summary: Indicates the canvas that allows you drawing on it.

member.summary: Draw background. Properties in used:

member.summary: Draw grid lines. Properties in used:

member.summary: Provides text drawing method set.

member.summary: Draw grid text (given digits, modifiable digits and candidates). Properties in used:

member.summary: Represents export method set.

member.summary: Represents a ratio value.

member.summary: Indicates the value.

member.summary: Measure the fact value (i.e. performs the formula * .RatioValue).
